Variables.Name: Notifies
Variables.Description: Animation notifies, sorted by time (earliest notification first).

Variables.Name: SequenceLength
Variables.Description: Length (in seconds) of this AnimSequence if played back with a speed of 1.0.

Variables.Name: RateScale
Variables.Description: Number for tweaking playback rate of this animation globally.

Functions.Name: GetPlayLength
Functions.Description: Returns the total play length of the montage, if played back with a speed of 1.0.
